title: Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you've just received an email from PayPal: your account has been suspended due to 'high-risk activity.' Or perhaps Stripe has sent you a cryptic message stating that your business is 'ineligible for service.' The harsh truth is that these platforms have strict policies that often favor their interests over yours. As a result, you're left wondering how you'll continue selling digital products to your customers without breaking the bank or risking your business's reputation. The answer lies in a crypto-native infrastructure that can help you sidestep these restrictions and get paid instantly, without the need for intermediaries or costly fees. But which solution is right for you?
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's break down the services offered by each platform. PayPal and Stripe provide a payment gateway that allows customers to pay using their credit cards or bank accounts. However, this comes with a hefty price tag, including transaction fees, chargeback fees, and even suspension fees. In contrast, a crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments offers a seamless payment experience with reduced fees, no chargebacks, and no account suspensions. But what about the digital product delivery aspect? A platform like Gumroad allows creators to sell digital products, but they often lack the flexibility and customization options offered by a dedicated e-commerce solution like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. This engine provides automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it an attractive option for creators who value convenience and reliability.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict policies regarding high-risk countries, which often include nations in Africa, Asia, and Latin America. These countries are deemed 'high-risk' due to factors such as high chargeback rates, lack of KYC, or other perceived risks. As a result, creators from these countries are often locked out of these platforms, forced to rely on alternative solutions. A crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments, on the other hand, doesn't discriminate based on location or risk. With 300+ supported coins and no KYC requirements, creators can accept payments from customers worldwide, regardless of their geographical location or risk profile.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, a crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments is unmatched. Transactions are processed in real-time, ensuring that creators receive their payments instantly. In contrast, PayPal and Stripe often take 1-3 days to process transactions, leaving creators waiting anxiously for their funds. As for fees, a crypto-native infrastructure is generally more cost-effective, with lower transaction fees and no chargeback fees. This means that creators can keep more of their hard-earned revenue, rather than handing it over to intermediaries like PayPal and Stripe.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery, a dedicated e-commerce solution like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine excels. This engine provides automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it an attractive option for creators who value convenience and reliability. Additionally, the engine integrates seamlessly with a crypto-native frontend like Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. This means that creators can focus on what they do best – creating digital products – while the infrastructure takes care of the rest.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which solution is right for you? If you're looking for a cost-effective, hassle-free way to accept payments from customers worldwide, a crypto-native infrastructure like NOWPayments is the way to go. If you need more advanced features like automated delivery and payment verification, a dedicated e-commerce solution like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine is the better choice. Either way, you can say goodbye to intermediaries like PayPal and Stripe, and hello to a more streamlined, efficient way of doing business.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries, you're in the right place. At Unchained Commerce, we offer a range of solutions to help you get paid instantly, without the need for intermediaries or costly fees. Check out our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, which allows customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. And when you're ready to take your business to the next level, visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to explore our range of e-commerce solutions.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling digital products using a crypto-native infrastructure, follow these steps: First, sign up for a NOWPayments account and connect it to your Unchained Commerce Core Shop Engine. Next, configure your payment options to accept your preferred cryptocurrencies. Finally, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect frontend to enable seamless payment experiences for your customers. Once you've completed these steps, you're ready to start selling digital products and getting paid instantly.
The store that runs on a wallet and a webhook cannot be suspended by anyone else's compliance team.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
